dialogues.speaker: Ali
dialogues.en: Excuse me! How much are these apples?

dialogues.speaker: Emma
dialogues.en: They are three pounds per kilo.

dialogues.speaker: Emma
dialogues.en: Sure! Would you like anything else?
dialogues.ar: بالتأكيد! هل تريد أي شيء آخر؟

dialogues.speaker: Ali
dialogues.en: Yes, I need some oranges too. Are they fresh?
dialogues.ar: نعم، أحتاج بعض البرتقال أيضاً. هل هو طازج؟

dialogues.speaker: Emma
dialogues.en: Yes, very fresh! They arrived this morning.
dialogues.ar: نعم، طازج جداً! وصل هذا الصباح.

dialogues.speaker: Ali
dialogues.en: Great! I'll take one kilo of oranges.

dialogues.speaker: Emma
dialogues.en: That will be nine pounds in total.

questions.question: What did Ali ask about first?
How many kilos of apples did Ali buy?
